reasoning: Super Bowl LX will conclude the 2025 NFL season in February 2026. Because free agency, the draft, and injuries create high variance in the NFL year-over-year, predicting a champion two seasons out requires significant regression to the mean compared to current odds. While the 49ers are currently a top team with a favorable window (Brock Purdy still on his rookie deal through 2025), their implied probability of winning the upcoming Super Bowl (LIX) is around 14-16%. Discounting for the additional year of uncertainty, an elite team's chances should sit closer to 7-9%. Thus, a 7.5% estimate balances their strong fundamentals with the inherent unpredictability of the NFL over a two-year horizon.
